title: Phase 277 coordination validation and guardrails
description: Add lightweight validation and guardrails so Beads coordination stays explicit, non-product, and separate from GSD/CI/release authority.
close_reason: Phase 277 completed: added explicit Beads coordination validation script, docs boundary, and focused repository guardrail tests.

title: Phase 276 issue lifecycle and handoff proof
description: Prove Beads issue lifecycle from create/claim/discovered-from/close through Docker-backed observation and session handoff guidance.
close_reason: Phase 276 completed: proved create/claim/discovered-from/close lifecycle, Docker-backed dependency observation, and Git-vs-Dolt handoff documentation.

title: Phase 275 worktree coordination contract
description: Document and validate the redirect pattern that lets parallel phase worktrees share one Beads issue truth while keeping branch isolation.
close_reason: Phase 275 completed: documented Beads worktree redirects, validation commands, and branch isolation rules after validating an existing redirected worktree.

title: Phase 274 Beads service contract and agent onboarding
description: Lock the repository-facing Beads service contract and agent command guidance around the Docker-backed Videra Dolt database.
close_reason: Phase 274 completed: documented Docker-backed Beads service contract, agent onboarding commands, project identity boundary, and main checkout validation.

title: Initialize v2.34 milestone planning
description: Open the next GSD milestone after v2.33 completion, scoped around Beads-backed multi-agent collaboration and worktree coordination.
close_reason: Initialized v2.34 planning docs, roadmap, requirements, and Beads-backed coordination scope.

title: Configure Beads multi-agent collaboration services
description: Set up Beads so agents can coordinate through Docker-backed Dolt issue state, shared worktree redirects, and Codex/Claude agent guidance. Verify service health after configuration.
close_reason: Configured Docker-backed Videra beads database, worktree redirects, and agent integrations.

title: Proof discovered follow-up for Beads lifecycle
description: Lifecycle proof issue created with discovered-from linkage during Phase 276; closed after proving follow-up capture works without markdown TODOs.
close_reason: Proof follow-up captured through discovered-from linkage; no implementation follow-up required.
